name: Paranormal Mutagens: Cargo
short_description: Paranormal Mutagens: Cargo is a first-person eldritch horror game. Manage a spacecraft and its passengers while battling eerie anomalies and struggling to survive the chaos unfolding aboard. Can you endure the horrors and complete your mission?
detailed_description:
Welcome to the world of Paranormal Mutagens
where the presence of ancient gods endangers the essence of daily life

The year is 2574. You are a worker for the Red Horizon Corporation, stationed aboard a spacecraft on its journey to Saturn. Your task is to maintain the ship and care for the passengers on board. Along the way, you’ll encounter countless dangerous anomalies. Do you have what it takes to endure and complete your mission?

What to Expect from This Game:

  • Easy to Normal difficulty.

  • Approximately 1.5 to 2 hours of gameplay if you take your time to explore.

  • Multiple endings.

  • No loud jump scares.
